title: GenoListeria Multiplex: Identification by multiplex real-time PCR of 30 major clonal complexes of Listeria monocytogenes strains
author: FELIX Benjamin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This method describes the identification, on  Listeria monocytogenes  bacterial strains, of 30 CCs of MLST and 5 molecular serotypes by real-time PCR through 13 multiplex PCR reactions.
steps_raw: This method describes the identification, on  Listeria monocytogenes  bacterial strains, of 30 CCs of MLST and 5 molecular serotypes by real-time PCR through 13 multiplex PCR reactions.
